****************
Electricity
****************

Electricity sub-package manages classes relevent to managing data on electricity used in both material production and building operations. :py:class:`~pod_lca.electricity.ElectricityProducer` class manages the electricity generation aspects including :py:class:`~pod_lca.impacts.Impacts` and :py:class:`~pod_lca.impacts.Emissions`. :py:class:`~pod_lca.electricity.ElectricitySupply` manages the  electricity usage aspects including mix of electricity generation technologies.


--------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 3

   electricity_producer
   electricity_supply
